name: Linzer Torte
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup currant jam or cherry jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Work together butter, flour, almonds, sugar, spices, and egg yolks into a dough. Refrigerate for 30 minutes.
2. Preheat oven to 325 degrees F (165 C). Butter a 9-inch round cake pan. Roll out half the dough to a thickness of 1/2 inch. Line the bottom and sides of the cake pan with dough and spread jam on top.
3. Roll out remaining dough, cut into strips, and place on top of torte to form a lattice. Brush with egg white. Bake for an hour in preheated oven. Remove from oven and sprinkle with confectioners' sugar. Serves 8-12.
